zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Horton II於1372年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利時，他的父親William de Horton43歲，母親Agnes Byrches29歲。他於1405年與Joanne De Dutton在英國英格蘭爾哈頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年4月在他的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Horton II于1372年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利时，他的父亲William de Horton43岁，母亲Agnes Byrches29岁。他于1405年与Joanne De Dutton在英国英格兰爾哈頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年4月在他的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Horton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as those in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Northamptonshire, Shropshire, Somerset, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, and Yorkshire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English horh or horu ‘dirt, filth’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some may have different origins, including Horton in Gloucestershire, which may derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + tūn.

variants.name: Horten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Horten, from an unattested word denoting ‘uneven, hard and lumpy soil’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Horton II was born in 1372, in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Horton, was 43 and his mother, Agnes Byrches, was 29. He married Joanne De Dutton in 1405, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in April 1413, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Horton II est né en 1372, à Mowsley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Horton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes Byrches, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joanne De Dutton en 1405, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1413, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Horton II 1372 in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Horton 43 und seine Mutter Agnes Byrches 29. Er hat 1405 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Joanne De Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1413 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Horton II è nato il nel 1372 nel Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Horton, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Byrches, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joanne De Dutton nel 1405, nel Hatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1413, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Horton IIが1372年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアモウスリーで生まれた時，父William de Hortonは43歳，母Agnes Byrchesは29歳であった。1405年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンでJoanne De Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年4月に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Horton II(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 모우슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Horton(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Byrches(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 Joanne De Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 4월 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Horton II nasceu em 1372, em Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Horton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Byrches, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanne De Dutton em 1405, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1413, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Horton II родился в 1372 г. в местности моусли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Horton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Byrches, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne De Dutton в 1405 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1413 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Horton II nació en 1372, en Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Horton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Agnes Byrches, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joanne De Dutton en 1405, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1413, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
